pose_notes: Head tilts toward seed bowl side by 2px.
Beak slightly open in 2 of 4 frames.

acceptance_criteria: Sprite sheet is exactly 160x40px (4 frames × 40x40) with 0px spacing.
Animation plays at 2fps and respects loop/play_count settings in specs.animation.
Sprite remains readable at 1x scale on a 128x128 canvas; no anti-aliasing and only listed colors are used.
shared_properties: Per-frame bounds remain 40x40 px with pixel-perfect pixel_art output.
Layer remains character with category character.
differences: Asset purpose: Echo (Cockatiel) — Hungry (4 frames, 2fps loop).
Role focuses on hungry behavior with usage: Echo behavior state: hungry.
Animation contract uses 4 frame(s) at 2 fps with loop set to true.

reference_images.label: echo_object_doc
reference_images.purpose: Cockatiel body proportion, crest, cheek patch, and state silhouette anchor.

reference_images.label: behavior_system_doc
reference_images.purpose: Echo state machine timing, animation counts, and trigger anchor.

reference_images.label: art_direction_doc
reference_images.purpose: Pixel-art palette, silhouette, and warm interior mood anchor.

bevy_constraints.bundle_strategy: SpriteSheetBundle for character asset loading with nearest-neighbor sampling and deterministic z-order.
bevy_constraints.asset_loading: Load character/echo_hungry_4f_2fps.png through AssetServer and store the handle under echo_hungry_4f_2fps.
runtime_notes: Use integer translation values so the 40x40 bird sprite remains pixel-perfect over the perch baseline.
Register manifest execution_order in a startup resource so build order stays deterministic during content validation.
Read frame size and bounds from specs.dimensions_px rather than texture metadata during runtime checks.
